benefits.description: Tennis elbow starting to feel better; previously didn't think could continue gym due to elbow pain
Crushed PRs for almost every exercise in three consecutive heavy lifting sessions

side_effects.description: Sticking himself 14 times/week in a tender area (near elbow); considering rotating injection sites due to this

protocol_notes: Injecting BPC subQ near the inside of the elbow twice a day. Uses 30g insulin needle. Plans to rotate to outer elbow and shoulder area. Uses chip clip technique to pinch skin before injecting.
